text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shhhooom... BANG!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Tracen Academy's Fan Fest. It's a day on
which fans are welcomed onto the campus and
various events are held.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this particular event, Mejiro Bright has found
herself competing against peers she rarely gets to
face on the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Well, well, well! It's been a long time, Bright! Come on, let's show the fans a clash of intense pathos!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! I only get to sprint with y'all once in a
blue moon! Looks like we got ourselves a contest
today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pearl, Taiki, let's make the most of this
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her opponents are Seeking the Pearl and Taiki
Shuttle, the latter a lively cowgirl currently
wreaking havoc throughout the short-distance
world.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, folks! ♪ On the mic today, it's me—the
pedal-to-the-metal and totally bodacious
Umamusume, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What does today's contest entail, you ask? Well,
I'll tell ya! It's a bona fide battle of endurance!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But this is not just any old "tough-it-out" bout!
We're going to be using the latest Umalator tech
to send these racers to a super-gnarly VR world!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Which Umamusume will survive this grueling
ordeal?! Let's find out! Readyyy... Go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"Grueling ordeal"? I'm not sure about this,
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can practically see the question mark hovering
over Mejiro Bright's head as I send her off, still
oblivious to the rules of the event.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hooo boy... A snowy mountain, huh... Shiver... B-b-boy howdy, this place's colder than Kentucky...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. Yes, now that you mention it, it is rather
nippy, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... I can't handle this much longer... Tell ya
what, Bright! I'll race ya to that cave over yonder!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And once we get there, we can pitch a tent, light
ourselves a campfire, and get sippin' on some
nice, warm milk! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt! Aaand Taiki Shuttle iiis out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kentucky-born Taiki Shuttle is out of the
event before it even gets underway. However...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ahahaaa! The temperature will have to drop way lower to stop me! Virginian winters put this cold to shame!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: On to the next world! Let's go, go, go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a haunted American ghost town! Can you
overcome the horrors that lie in wait?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh-hehe... Th-this place doesn't frighten me!
Know why?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I'm the (future) globe-trotting
Umamusume! And (someday) this spooky stuff
won't scare me one bit!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: What about you, Bright?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, me? I'm starting to feel quite famished. I
would love to take a tea break right about now.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
...Ohh, I get it. The atmosphere never gets to you,
huh? No wonder you're so confident when you
race...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: But in the end, I will be the victor! I've mentally prepared for countless countries across the globe, so there's nowhere I can't handle!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
NOOOOO! As if I would've included somewhere
like this in my travel itinerary!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: And wouldn't we immediately shatter into stardust if we came here for real?! Nnnghhh... There's just so much... space...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear me. There's no oxygen at all. What a
bother...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: No oxygen is just a bother to you? I-I guess it really does take a lot to ruffle a Mejiro...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
All right, you win... I might be world-class, but
your family's on another planet entirely.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But just you wait! I'll be the very next
Umamusume to welcome the void of space!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And the endurance battle is over! Mejiro Bright is
your winner, folks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my! How absolutely wonderful...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. She's prim, proper, and totally
unflappable. How did she stay so calm under
those conditions?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Her nerves must be made of steel.
We're rooting for you, Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, one and all! Just as I have during this
battle of endurance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I shall commit my utmost to the G1 races this
spring as well. As such, I do hope I can count on
your support.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Wow... She's a lady among ladies!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's polished and dignified in every way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
On a side note, I am rather hungry.
Trainer? Where have you gotten to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? I believe it's snack time. I'd quite like to
eat now... Traaaineeer...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Huh? Something seems... different about her.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... So much for those nerves of steel.
Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Be it through her innate endurance or her
carefree displays, Mejiro Bright remains a source
of excitement at the event.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey! I know how much you fans out there
are buzzing after Mejiro Bright's win, so let's go
have a little chitchat with her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Bright, seeing you show all that pluck out there
today suddenly gave me a sense of déjà vu...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And that's when it hit me—you remind me of that Mejiro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Someone in the Mejiro family? Who could it be? I
don't think I'm especially similar to anyone else in
the family...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The person you most remind me of...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...is Grandma Mejiro! The younger her, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hm? My Grandmother?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yep. This is all from a book, but I read that from
a young age, she had amazing mental fortitude
and initiative.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Even before traveling abroad came into vogue,
she made an effort to mingle with notable people
from around the world...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She also became one half of a power couple with
someone from another reputable family, and the
two of them made incredible contributions to the
world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She's seen as a fairly traditional leader these
days, but apparently, she took center stage in a
wide variety of endeavors back in her day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow... I hadn't any idea that Grandmother
was like that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Totally! In fact, finding out about her incredible
life really inspired me! I think the get-up-and-go
pep I've got going on is thanks to her influence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she had that effect on you? I didn't realize
Grandmother led such a life... And on top of
that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: To be told... that I resemble her...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, the resemblance is uncanny. ♪ I know you're
a member of the Mejiro family and I'm not, but
you and I, Bright...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we're rocking that same toughie vibe.
It's kinda like destiny, y'know. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: To think that... Grandmother and I... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, whoa now. What's with the tears? Was it
something I said?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry, Trainer... I didn't mean to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that those aren't tears of sadness
trickling down Mejiro Bright's face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Even among my family... I've always been part of
the background... straggling behind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But now I find out... I have such a precious bond with my dear grandmother... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Grandmother... Thank you... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Mejiro Bright...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans gathered in the venue are starting to
well up with her. A wave of sympathy washes over
the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so! Things got pretty tender for a moment
there, but make sure to cheer for Bright, okay
everybody?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She might be on the quiet side, but she's my
secretly-fab-on-the-inside total bestie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Everyone... All of you out there... Thank you ever
so much for your support!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Please continue to cheer for me, and for the
Mejiro family I love so dearly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roar of the crowd that follows almost blows
the roof off of the venue as it echoes across the
sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After rediscovering a forgotten episode of Mejiro
history, Mejiro Bright and her fans alike are
deeply moved.
